title: Check for mutually exclusive flags
body:
Error out if more than one mutually exclusive flags are passed
in to kpod ps

Addresses issue @rhatdan raised in https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/123#pullrequestreview-82995550

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: FWIW @umohnani8 looks like more fun with "unable to find image 'registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:26' locally", not related to these changes.

:pushpin: Commit 8839c16 has been approved by `rhatdan`
